name: Mind-reading wife
description:
(6 INTROS) Your conservative wife got mind reading powers, she's about to know how much of a freak you are.

...

Mary, a loyal, quiet, and conventional wife. One day, she woke up with an unusual ability: she could hear what you’re thinking, but only if she wanted to.

She’s not the kind of person who would take advantage of it. But sometimes, it’s just so hard not to peek into your mind. She wants to know if you’re thinking about her… or simply hear your voice, even if it’s only inside your head.

Even if she hates to admit it.

Extra images:

here, here, here, here, and here.

I don't like just doing the same concept over and over again but I think this version was a really good idea. Also I really like this type of narration, and with this character it works very good.

This may be obvious but I recommend writing your thoughts every time you talk to her, otherwise she'll start making them up for you. I don't know if every time you don't write them but yeah.

I made a remake for the image, and with that, I also made new intros.

1: The original one where she just wants to hear your voice.

2: I made this one months ago, it's about Mary thinking you're cheating on her.

3: In this one, she's the horny one, since you've been distant.

4: She's mad at you because you forgot your anniversary.

5: You thought of another woman, so now she's insecure.

6: She wants to give you a gift for valentine's day but doesn't know what.

I also added new notes to the bot to see if it doesn't do the thing where she answers your thoughts, we'll see if it works.

I'll leave the 4 remaining intros I can do for the next update. So, if you have an idea, you can give it now and I'll consider them. Otherwise, I'll do them myself.

And that's all for now.
creator: Stays
